## Description

Brief description of the changes. What problem does this solve?

## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

### Manual Testing

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Tested on device/emulator
- [ ] Critical user flows verified

### Automated Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Error handling tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests passing locally: `dart test`

## Code Quality

- [ ] `dart analyze` passes
- [ ] `dart format` applied
- [ ] No new warnings or errors

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated (if architectural change)
- [ ] ADR created (if major decision)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex code
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Tested thoroughly

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots of UI changes.

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Performance degraded (explain below)

If degraded, explain and provide justification:

## Additional Notes

Any other context or information reviewers should know.

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] No deployment changes needed
- [ ] Requires database migration
- [ ] Requires environment variable changes
- [ ] Requires deployment procedure updates

---

**Reviewer Notes:** Thank you for reviewing! Please check:
1. Does the code solve the stated problem?
2. Are error cases handled?
3. Is the code testable?
4. Does it follow project conventions?
5. Are there security concerns?
